query_normalized: predicting the impact of surface treatments on the adhesion strength of polymers materials science
rationale: This paper directly measures the same mechanism the user is asking about: surface treatment (atmospheric pressure plasma treatment) affecting adhesion strength (peel strength) of polymers (cycloolefin polymer). It satisfies acceptance criteria (a) same-mechanism evidence and (b) independent/dependent variable on the same domain, as it empirically studies the relationship between surface treatments and polymer adhesion strength in materials science.
